summary: Matched the Figure Get stage unit by decompiling grFigureGet_802196F0 and grFigureGet_80219898, tightening grFigureGet_80219B10 to 100%, typing Figure Get ground/config data, and correcting symbols/splits so grfigureget.c could move from NonMatching to Matching.
key_files: src/melee/gr/grfigureget.c — added matching implementations for grFigureGet_802196F0 and grFigureGet_80219898, adjusted grFigureGet_80219B10, added needed subsystem includes and typed grFigureGet_Data.
src/melee/gr/types.h — refined grFigureGet_GroundVars from loose UNK_T/scalars into s32 fields and three-slot arrays including Item_GObj* x34[3].
configure.py — changed melee/gr/grfigureget.c from Object(NonMatching) to Object(Matching).
config/GALE01/splits.txt — moved grfigureget .sbss ownership out of the unit and shrank its .sdata2 range to end at 0x804DBB60.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt — corrected grFigureGet callback scope, rodata size, local data label, and anonymous local sdata2 constants.
what_changed: Implemented grFigureGet_802196F0: initializes the stage ground object animation, clears ground callbacks, selects three figure/toy IDs, initializes counters/arrays, and registers grFigureGet_80219B10 with mpJointSetCb1.

Implemented grFigureGet_80219898: iterates fighters to reset joint_id_skip, drives a spawn countdown, places spawned items using Figure Get data and Stage_GetCamBoundsTopOffset, records spawned Item_GObj pointers, handles completion state through stage_info.flags, and calls lb_800115F4.

Made grFigureGet_80219B10 fully match by introducing an ECBFlagStruct temporary, using an explicit item classifier value 0x6, and comparing cur_pos.x against extern sdata2 constants grFigureGet_804DBB60 and grFigureGet_804DBB64 instead of literals.
Added a local grFigureGet_Data struct for the global pointer grFigureGet_804D6AC0, with three integer fields followed by float parameters at xC, x10, and x14.
Changed grFigureGet_GroundVars so x0/x4 are s32 counters, x10 is int[3], x1C remains int[3], x28 remains HSD_GObj*[3], and x34 was added as Item_GObj*[3].
Added includes for stage, ftlib, gmregclear, lb_00B0, lb_00F9, mplib, tydisplay, and toy; removed the grdisplay include.
Defined static Vec3 const grFigureGet_803B8470 as a zero vector, matching the corrected rodata object size of 0xC.
Updated GALE01 symbols so grFigureGet_OnTouchLine and grFigureGet_OnCheckShadowRender are local, grFigureGet_803B8470 is size 0xC, and several sdata2 constants became anonymous local @ labels.
Updated splits so grpushon owns the sbss range through 0x804D6AC8 while grfigureget no longer lists sbss and its sdata2 ends at 0x804DBB60.
smart_moves: Modeled repeated Figure Get state as three-slot arrays in grFigureGet_GroundVars, which matches the loops over indices 0..2 and avoids opaque scalar padding.

Typed grFigureGet_804D6AC0 as a pointer to a small data/config struct, making offset-based loads for timer ranges, spawn count, horizontal bounds, and vertical offset readable enough to compile-match.
Used a static zero Vec3 for grFigureGet_803B8470 instead of leaving the rodata as an anonymous or incorrectly sized object.
Preserved compiler-sensitive shapes in grFigureGet_80219B10: the ECBFlagStruct temporary, explicit classifier literal, and sdata2 symbol references were used where cleaner source forms did not match.
Finished the unit cleanly by updating configure.py only after code, rodata, and sdata2 were reported matched.
Corrected section attribution in splits/symbols alongside the source change, preventing grfigureget from carrying stale sbss/sdata2 ranges.
decomp_lessons: When a stage file becomes fully matching, check splits and symbols at adjacent unit boundaries; here grfigureget data ownership changes affected grpushon sbss and grfigureget sdata2 ranges.
Do not over-name compiler-local constants: the PR replaced several global-looking grFigureGet_804DBB40..804DBB58 sdata2 symbols with local @ labels once the source exposed their true locality.
GroundVars structs should be updated when code reveals repeated slots; arrays can be the difference between opaque UNK_T fields and natural matching loops.
A small file-local data struct is often better than UNK_T for global stage parameter blocks, even when field names are still offset-style.
Bitfield reads from CollData/ECBFlagStruct may need an explicit temporary and casts to reproduce the original load order.
Literal floats may need to be referenced as extern sdata2 symbols when the original code loads named small-data constants rather than embedding equivalent constants directly.
naming_conventions: Unidentified Figure Get helpers retain the module prefix plus address suffix, such as grFigureGet_802196F0 and grFigureGet_80219898.
Stage callbacks use the grFigureGet_On... convention; this PR kept OnTouchLine and OnCheckShadowRender but corrected them to local scope in symbols.txt.
Struct fields remained offset-based x0/x4/x8 style where semantics were not proven, while layout evidence justified array forms like x10[3], x1C[3], x28[3], and x34[3].
File-local compiler constants in sdata2 are represented with @NNN labels rather than exported grFigureGet_804D... names when the symbols are local.
The new data struct name grFigureGet_Data follows the module-prefixed type naming pattern for stage-specific data blocks.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Inserted PAD_STACK(8) in grFigureGet_802196F0, indicating stack layout was part of the match.
Kept unused or padding-like locals such as i2, var_r30, pad2, temp_r0, var_r29, and pad in the matched functions to preserve compiler register/stack behavior.
Initialized pos from static const grFigureGet_803B8470 before mutating x/y, matching the zero-vector rodata reference.
Used ECBFlagStruct* tmp = &cd->x34_flags and a nested condition shape in grFigureGet_80219B10 to match the bitfield/classifier check.
Used item_gobj->classifier == 0x6 instead of the symbolic HSD_GOBJ_CLASS_ITEM form in the final matching source.
Replaced direct 4.5f and -4.5f comparisons with grFigureGet_804DBB60 and grFigureGet_804DBB64 extern float symbols for sdata2 matching.
Adjusted symbol scope and local labels for rodata/data/sdata2 so the data sections could match alongside text.
review_feedback: No human review comments or review records were present in the slice; the PR body was null.
decomp.dev reported GALE01 matched code +0.03% (+1336 bytes), linked code +0.05% (+1896 bytes), matched data +48 bytes, and linked data +208 bytes.
decomp.dev listed 5 new matches: grFigureGet_80219898, grFigureGet_802196F0, grfigureget .sdata2, grfigureget .rodata, and grFigureGet_80219B10.
The bot also noted one unmatched-item regression: main/melee/gr/grpushon .sbss dropped from 50.00% to 25.00%, consistent with the split boundary moving sbss ownership to grpushon.
follow_up_queries: grFigureGet_80219B10 ECBFlagStruct tmp classifier 0x6 sdata2 bounds
grFigureGet_804D6AC0 grFigureGet_Data x0 x4 x8 xC x10 x14
